test.prettifiedMethodName: Returns all when no whitelist or blacklist
Get errors empty when all valid
Get errors returns missing query error
Get errors returns missing filename error
Get errors xml missing root name
Get errors returns empty for unknown source
Open file write chunk finalize produces file
Finalize file returns path ending in csv
Get settings returns empty array when settings is null
Get formatted created at returns empty string when null
Get formatted created at default format
Get formatted created at custom format
Validate returns true with valid sql download params
Validate returns false for invalid sql
Validate returns false when xml missing root name
Get errors populated after failed validation
Get errors empty after successful validation
Date process empty string returns zero
Relationship returns empty array with no context
Relationship returns empty array when no child ids
Relationship returns entry id when not cached
Grid returns empty array with no context
Grid returns empty array when no rows
Grid maps column names to values
Get field returns null for unknown type
Get field is cached between calls
Finalize file returns path ending in json
Validation passes with valid dir and filename
Validation fails for non existent dir
Format without context omits json brace
Should log returns true for error
Should log returns true for notice
Should log returns true for warning
Should log returns false for debug
Should log returns false for info
Returns rows unchanged when no modify params
Skips field not present in row
Replace with default on empty string
Replace with custom param ignores input
Ee date returns value unchanged when no format
Ee date returns value unchanged when value is zero
Get returns null default when key missing
Get returns provided default when key missing
Get domain params excludes non prefixed when false
Get domain params includes all when true
Get domain params returns empty when no prefixed keys
Get source sets options on returned object
Validation fails when root name missing
Validation fails when branch name missing
Finalize file returns path ending in xml
Field values appear in xml output
Start and end branch creates child element
Add xml nodes numeric key uses item with index
Add xml nodes nested array creates child elements
Set char set appears in xml declaration
